overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character walking through a rocky canyon at night, transitioning to open grassland prairie. The atmospheric scene features moonlit landscapes and a brief encounter with an NPC rider on horseback.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the narrow rocky canyon

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation rising beside the path
steep rocky hillside forming the canyon wall
winding dirt path cutting through the canyon floor
dark blue night sky with scattered clouds visible between the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail winding through a rocky canyon at night. Tall cliff faces flank both sides of the path while the dark blue sky with scattered clouds is visible overhead. The environment is quiet and empty, with only sparse vegetation along the canyon floor.

events.description: exits the rocky canyon into open grassland prairie with expansive views
NPC rider on horseback gallops across the path from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through open grassland, approaching a distant ranch building

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback galloping quickly from right to left across the path

entered.detail: expansive grassy prairie stretching to the horizon under the night sky
white ranch building visible in the distance across the prairie
isolated trees and shrubs dotting the grassland

segments.scene_description: Exiting the canyon, the scene opens into a wide grassland prairie under the night sky. The character continues along the path toward a distant ranch building visible on the left. At approximately 45 seconds, an NPC rider on horseback gallops across the path from right to left, adding a moment of activity to the otherwise serene landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a moonlit canyon into the expansive openness of a nighttime prairie. It begins by trailing a character along a narrow dirt path winding between towering cliff faces under a dark blue, clouded sky. As the character moves forward, the rocky walls gradually recede and the scene opens into a wide grassland prairie, shifting the perspective from a confined corridor to a vast horizon. The camera continues toward a distant ranch building on the left before a rider on horseback suddenly gallops across the path from right to left. The movement finally settles into the serene, open landscape as the rider disappears into the distance.
